title: Compass Locator
description:
Hold a compass to enable the locator bar!
Have a compass in your inventory to broadcast your location!
Find players up to 1024 blocks away!
body:
# Compass Locator
A rework of the locator bar mechanic using the compass!
- hold a compass in your hand to recieve waypoints from other players
- have a compass in your inventory to broadcast your position
- limits broadcast range to 1024 blocks

# For servers
- Compass Locator will not affect gameplay in your singleplayer world.
- Perfect for servers with players who might want to stay hidden.
- Provides a no-command, vanilla-esque way for players to choose whether they want to use the locator bar.

# Known Issues
It may take a few seconds to properly broadcast one's position to compass-wielders.
